name: Unit List
description: Units within a property displayed as cards or table. Shows unit number, specs, tenant, rent, and status.

grid.description: Responsive card grid of units showing unit number, specs, tenant, rent, and occupancy status

table.description: Sortable data table view of units with columns for number, specs, tenant, rent, and status

visual_brief: List of units within a property. Header shows 'Units' title with a unit count and an 'Add Unit' button. A summary bar shows counts by status (occupied, vacant, maintenance). The grid preset displays units as bordered cards, each showing unit number, bedroom/bathroom count, square footage, current tenant name (or 'Vacant' in muted text), rent amount, and a status badge. The table preset renders as a data table with those same fields as columns. Cards and rows are clickable to navigate to unit detail.

responsive.mobile: Single-column card stack. Summary bar shows counts compactly. Add Unit button is a FAB or in the header.
responsive.tablet: Two-column card grid or table with horizontal scroll.
responsive.desktop: Three-column card grid or full-width table with all columns visible.

composition.UnitCard: Card(d-surface, hoverable) > [UnitNumber(heading4) + SpecsRow > [Beds + Baths + SqFt(mono-data)] + TenantName?(font-medium) + Rent(mono-data) + StatusBadge(d-annotation, color: occupancy)]
